creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
beech       2008-05-19 02:07:50 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    devel                Makefile 
  Added files:
    devel/gittrac        Makefile pkg-message 
  Log:
  - New port gittrac: Web-Based Bug And Patch-Set Tracking System For Git
  - Slave port based on devel/cvstrac that implements Trac-like
    functionality for the Git SCM system.
  
  PR:             ports/123565
  Submitted by:   Greg Larkin <glarkin at sourcehosting.net>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.3062    +1 -0      ports/devel/Makefile
  1.1       +19 -0     ports/devel/gittrac/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +4 -0      ports/devel/gittrac/pkg-message (new)
